eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Eagle, CO; at 3:47 PM on JUL 22, 2026 Effective until 4:47 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Leave now if you are in the evacuation area along Buck Point Drive (zone RFF-257). It is not safe. EVACUATION ORDER: Wildfire in the area of Buck Point Drive and Cottonwood Pass Rd. Leave now if you are in the evacuation area along Buck Point Drive (zone RFF-257). It is not safe.
